doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: fabricated
reason: The document fabricates subsections, definitions, and state-specific claims not found in the actual ABA Model Rule 5.5, which addresses multijurisdictional practice rather than prescribing paralegal supervision rules in this manner.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 85
REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 covers unauthorized practice and multijurisdictional practice but does not contain subsections (a), (b), and (c) structured this way, nor does it include the fabricated definitional language about "practice of law," the prescriptive paralegal supervision rules, or the specific state disciplinary claims presented here as part of the Model Rule itself.
